programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: Kevin Harrington and Toli Cefail meet with the team at Advanced Vitality to explore the cutting edge of preventative healthcare. With over 60% of Americans facing accelerated cellular aging, the company is looking to scale fast—and needs the right strategy to do it. Next, Cindy from Scout & Zoe’s joins the conversation to share how her insect-based dog treats are creating buzz in the pet industry. Her clever and down-to-earth grassroots marketing approach (pun intended) is changing the game for alternative protein sources. Finally, Kevin and Toli sit down with leaders from Hammer Haag Steel and Zenith Trek to dive into the challenges and opportunities of building complex, large-scale equipment and structures.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: The A-Team gets back to work—this time diving into cross-marketing strategies for Advanced Vitality. Over at Hammer Haag, the team discusses launching a gritty new “Micro Dirty Jobs” miniseries to spotlight American manufacturing in action. We’re also introduced to serial entrepreneur Jeff Kline, founder of 1-800-Medigap, who brings a powerhouse presence to the team’s growing roster. Meanwhile, Cindy from Scout & Zoe’s returns for a full brand overhaul with the experts. Newest A-Team member Rudy Mawer steps in with high-level influencer insight and a mission to empower the next generation of entrepreneurs. And finally, Zenith Trek makes bold moves to break into big box retail—with the A-Team guiding the way.

This is conservation at its most daring—unmissable, unforgettable, and truly wild.

programme.desc: As the floating hospital leaves La Chorrera, Jeff arrives in the village of Providencia—home to the Bora people, whose culture is deeply tied to the sacred triad of coca, tobacco, and cassava. Unexpectedly, Jeff stumbles upon a rare and powerful event:...

programme.title: Vengeance Valley
programme.desc: The sons of a Colorado cattle baron, one biological and the other adopted, resent one another and fight for control of their father's cattle empire.

programme.title: Riders of the Deadline
programme.desc: The 50th of 66 Hopalong Cassidy films finds Hoppy in a vengeful mood. When his good friend Tim Mason is unjustly sent to jail and then killed when trying to escape, Hoppys bitterness gets him drummed out of the Texas Rangers. With the help of his pals ...

programme.title: The Gunman from Bodie
programme.desc: The Rough Riders, a popular group that thrilled audiences in the early 1940s, are after a gang of rustlers in this B-western from Hollywood's Poverty Row. Starring Buck Jones, Tim McCoy, and Raymond Hatton, this movie features everything from lawmen go...

programme.title: Red Ryder: Ride, Ryder, Ride!
programme.desc: Red Ryder encounters bandits trying to hold up the stagecoach carrying the owner of the Devil's Hole newspaper, Libby Brooks and her brother Gerry. Red successfully drives off the attackers but becomes embroiled in further conflict, leading to a duel t...

programme.title: Fighting Fury
programme.desc: A THRILLING TALE OF REVENGE AND REDEMPTION! Based on the story Triple Cross for Danger by the widely lauded Western author Walter J. Coburn, Fighting Fury is a thrilling take on the Western revenge drama. Portraying both a father and his son, star of s...

programme.title: Part IV - The Passing
programme.desc: A range war is erupting in Montana. Call settles issues with Dunnegan and Newt. Cherokee Jack runs amok.

programme.title: Part I - Leaving
programme.desc: Two former Texas Rangers decide to strike out from their south Texas base and drive a cattle herd to Montana.

programme.title: Part II - On The Trail
programme.desc: McCrae and Wood's cattle drive faces deadly situations.

programme.title: Part III - The Plains
programme.desc: Gus and July save Lorena from Blue Duck, but at a deadly cost. Jake runs with a bad crowd and pays the price.

programme.title: The Resurrection of Deadwood Dick
programme.desc: The mayor of Deadwood comes up with a manufactured Western hero to lure tourists into his dying town.

programme.title: Saddle Tramp
programme.desc: Cowboy (Joel McCrea) saddled with orphans and runaway (Wanda Hendrix).

programme.title: Return of the Gunfighter
programme.desc: Grit Xtra invites you to saddle up and ride alongside the larger-than-life stars of TV and cinema’s most iconic Westerns.

programme.title: Saddle the Wind
programme.desc: Retired gunfighter's (Robert Taylor) kid brother (John Cassavetes) takes to six-shooter.

programme.title: Ride, Vaquero
programme.desc: A Mexican bandit's right-hand man takes the side of a besieged Texas cattle rancher and his wife.

programme.title: How the West Was Won
programme.desc: Three generations of a family go west through a buffalo stampede, the Civil War and a train robbery.

programme.title: Wagon Train: Season 2, Episode 32: The Stage Coach Story
programme.desc: When a stagecoach is forced to take refuge at the wagon train camp after an encounter with hostile outlaws, the passengers bring with them a mysterious cargo and a dangerous secret. As the wagon train party works to protect them, they discover that one of the passengers is hiding a deadly truth that puts the entire expedition at risk.

programme.title: Stories of the Century S1E22 Little Britches,
programme.desc: Railroad detective Matt Clark pursues Alice "Little Britches" McJunkin, a young woman who has turned to a life of crime in the Wyoming Territory. As Clark attempts to apprehend her, he must reconcile his duty to uphold the law with the complex circumstances that led the young girl into the company of notorious outlaws

programme.title: Stories of the Century S1E6 Cattle Kate
programme.desc: Railroad detective Matt Clark travels to Wyoming to investigate the powerful and dangerous Ella Watson, known as "Cattle Kate." Clark must navigate local corruption and land disputes to build a case against her, ultimately aiming to put an end to her criminal activities and bring stability to the territory

programme.title: Wagon Train: Season 2, Episode 21: The Martha Barham Story
programme.desc: A young woman joins the wagon train, mourning the recent death of her husband in the Civil War. Struggling to cope with her grief while facing the harsh realities of the trail, she encounters a fellow traveler whose own troubled past helps her confront her loss and find the strength to look toward the future

programme.title: Boot Hill Bandits (1942)
programme.desc: The Range Busters ride into a troubled town to investigate a series of robberies and murders, uncovering a gang using fear and deception to control the area as they work to restore law and order.

programme.title: The Singing Cowgirl 1938
programme.desc: Dorothy Page saddles up as The Singing Cowgirl, bringing her golden voice and fearless spirit to the frontier! When rustlers and schemers threaten her family’s ranch, she fights back with courage, charm, and a song in her heart. Packed with action, romance, and toe-tapping tunes, this Western delivers a fresh twist on cowboy adventure.

programme.title: McLintock!
programme.desc: Wealthy rancher G. W. McLintock uses his power and influence in the territory to keep the peace between farmers, ranchers, land-grabbers, Indians and corrupt government officials.

programme.title: This Man Can't Die
programme.desc: Bounty hunter Martin Benson seeks the leader of a vicious outlaw smuggler gang who killed his parents and raped his sister, while his other siblings hide a wounded gang member in hopes of more info and try to help

programme.title: The Brand of Hate
programme.desc: Trouble starts when Bill Larkins and his two sons move in with his brother Joe. They start rustling cattle and then kill Rod's father with Joe's gun. The Sheriff and Rod think they did it and are after proof.

programme.title: Guns of Diablo
programme.desc: Wagon train scout Linc Murdock reminisces about his old feud with rancher Rance Macklin over pretty Maria during the time when Linc worked for the Macklin ranch.
